hero.title: The leading
hero.subtitle: Build your profile, discover opportunities at elite clubs worldwide, and advance your hockey career.

roleTabs.title: Built for everyone in hockey
roleTabs.subtitle: Whether you play, coach, manage a club, or support the game — there is a place for you.

players.description: Build your digital hockey CV. Showcase your stats, trajectory, and achievements to clubs around the world.
players.bullet2: Get discovered by clubs and scouts

coaches.description: Find coaching positions that match your experience and ambitions. Connect with clubs seeking your expertise.

clubs.description: Post open positions and connect with qualified players and coaches. Build your squad efficiently.
clubs.bullet2: Browse profiles of thousands of players

brands.description: Connect with the global hockey community. Partner with players and clubs to grow your brand.
brands.bullet2: Partner with top clubs and players
brands.bullet3: Grow your presence in the sport

features.title: How Stick Transfer works
features.subtitle: Three pillars connecting the global hockey community

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: Find and connect with players, coaches, and clubs from every corner of the world.

transfer.title: Transfer
transfer.description: Discover opportunities, apply to clubs, and manage your entire transfer journey in one place.

play.title: Play
play.description: Showcase your career, share your achievements, and build your professional hockey reputation.

vacancies.title: Hockey Vacancies
vacancies.subtitle: Open positions at clubs around the world

about.title: The platform built to transform
about.description1: Stick Transfer was born from a passion for field hockey and the need to create a dedicated space where players, clubs, and coaches can connect without barriers.
about.description2: Our mission is to make professional opportunities accessible to every hockey player — regardless of their geography, league, or background.

benefits.network: A dedicated network built exclusively for hockey
benefits.verified: Every club and opportunity manually reviewed
benefits.tools: Tools built to grow your sports career
benefits.community: A community you help shape from day one

stats.title: What we stand for
stats.subtitle: Built with purpose, transparency, and a genuine passion for the game.

players.label: Always Free
players.description: Create your profile, browse opportunities, and apply — at zero cost.

clubs.label: Direct Access
clubs.description: Connect directly with clubs and coaches — no middlemen, no fees.

countries.label: Global Network
countries.description: Players and opportunities from across every continent and league.

opportunities.label: Vetted Listings
opportunities.description: Every opportunity reviewed before it goes live — no spam, no fake posts.

stats.launchMessage: be among the first to join.

cta.title: Make your hockey profile (CV)
cta.subtitle: Join the global hockey network — free forever.
cta.bullet3: Sign up as fan, brand, or umpire

footer.description: The ultimate platform to connect field hockey players, clubs, and coaches around the world.
